headline: Markets sold off across risk assets as crypto collapsed and inflation fears drove bond yields higher…
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 29, 2026 Markets sold off across risk assets as crypto collapsed and inflation fears drove bond yields higher, with Bitcoin's institutional exodus bleeding into broader risk sentiment. The dollar strengthened while gold held firm, reflecting a classic stagflationary setup where growth concerns mount alongside persistent price pressures.
